problem id: f3971b9a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00000011
  01111010 -> 01001001
  11111001 -> 01100111
  01011111 -> 00001101
  10110110 -> 10011010
  10110001 -> 11000110
  00111011 -> 01001100
  00110011 -> 11001100
  11000010 -> 00001011
  10010100 -> 00010010

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 00011001
